name: The Sexy Doctor is Mine
overview: Arini is ready to do anything to get the blessing of her parents to study fashion design, including pretending to be a pious woman and having an arranged marriage with dr. Revano. However, Fenina – Revano's long lost ex-sudden reappears, and messes up Arini and Revano's engagement day. Began war and riots between these two tough women to fight over Revano.

trailers.title: Official Trailer The Sexy Doctor Is Mine | Anya Geraldine, Jolene Marie, Omar Daniel
